entries.title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
entries.description: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

entries.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
entries.description: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

entries.description: Now, when users navigate to Google Images, they'll see a "For You" gallery of images tailored to their interests and browsing history.

entries.title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
entries.description: Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius' compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.

entries.title: Superhuman’s new auto-draft feature almost makes me like AI replies
entries.description: Superhuman’s latest AI email drafting feature is its most convincing yet, generating replies that often required little to no editing in our testing.
